Structure# IOFireWireRemoteIsochPortInterface

Mac Catalyst 13.0+macOS 10.1+

```
typedef struct IOFireWireRemoteIsochPortInterface_t {
    ...
} IOFireWireRemoteIsochPortInterface;
```

## [Topics](/documentation/iokit/iofirewireremoteisochportinterface#topics)

### [Miscellaneous](/documentation/iokit/iofirewireremoteisochportinterface#1818407)

[`AllocatePort`](/documentation/iokit/iofirewireremoteisochportinterface/1569266-allocateport)The method is called when the port should configure its associated hardware to prepare to send or receive isochronous data on the channel number and at the speed specified.[`GetRefCon`](/documentation/iokit/iofirewireremoteisochportinterface/1569317-getrefcon)Get reference value associated with this port.[`GetSupported`](/documentation/iokit/iofirewireremoteisochportinterface/1569252-getsupported)The method is called to determine which FireWire isochronous channels and speed this port supports.[`ReleasePort`](/documentation/iokit/iofirewireremoteisochportinterface/1569201-releaseport)The method is called to release the hardware after the channel has been stopped.[`SetAllocatePortHandler`](/documentation/iokit/iofirewireremoteisochportinterface/1569327-setallocateporthandler)[`SetGetSupportedHandler`](/documentation/iokit/iofirewireremoteisochportinterface/1569273-setgetsupportedhandler)[`SetRefCon`](/documentation/iokit/iofirewireremoteisochportinterface/1569305-setrefcon)Set reference value associated with this port.[`SetReleasePortHandler`](/documentation/iokit/iofirewireremoteisochportinterface/1569272-setreleaseporthandler)[`SetStartHandler`](/documentation/iokit/iofirewireremoteisochportinterface/1569358-setstarthandler)[`SetStopHandler`](/documentation/iokit/iofirewireremoteisochportinterface/1569289-setstophandler)[`Start`](/documentation/iokit/iofirewireremoteisochportinterface/1569244-start)The method is called when the port is to begin talking or listening.[`Stop`](/documentation/iokit/iofirewireremoteisochportinterface/1569216-stop)The method is called when the port is to stop talking or listening.### [Instance Variables](/documentation/iokit/iofirewireremoteisochportinterface#1818444)
